hero.title: Advanced kidney care, close to home.
hero.brand_phrase: Advanced nephrology. The future of kidney health.
hero.subhead: Dialysis, CKD management, AKI care and preventive screening — under one roof in Sambalpur, with consultants who know your name and your reports.

services_strip.title: What we treat
services_strip.subhead: From a first reading of your reports to long-term care, we walk with you.

doctors_strip.title: The team behind your care
doctors_strip.subhead: Nephrologists you can talk to, and a 24×7 dialysis-trained nursing team.

facilities_strip.title: Built for kidney care, end to end.
facilities_strip.subhead: Six modern hemodialysis stations, a renal ICU, an in-house lab, and a 24×7 ambulance.

insurance_strip.title: Empanelled with leading insurers
insurance_strip.subhead: Cashless treatment with most major insurers and TPAs.

cta_band.title: A second opinion is always welcome.
cta_band.subhead: Send us your reports or book a consultation — we'll get back within 24 hours.
cta_band.phrase: Advanced nephrology. The future of kidney health.
